headline: CIO at The Friedkin Group driving enterprise AI, digital transformation, and technology leadership.
title: Chief Information Officer
confidenceNote: LinkedIn, Forbes Councils, Gartner, ORBIE, and HoustonCIO sources consistently identify Rennu Varghese as VP/CIO at The Friedkin Group.
bioMarkdown: Rennu Varghese is CIO at The Friedkin Group, where he leads technology and AI transformation across a diversified portfolio. Useful match for conversations on enterprise AI adoption, CIO strategy, change management, and portfolio-scale technology operations.

primary.label: LinkedIn profile
